mapper.select: SELECT d.*, p.dept_name AS parent_dept_name FROM departments d LEFT JOIN departments p ON d.parent_dept_code = p.dept_code ORDER BY d.dept_level, d.dept_code
SELECT d.*, p.dept_name AS parent_dept_name FROM departments d LEFT JOIN departments p ON d.parent_dept_code = p.dept_code WHERE d.dept_code = #{deptCode}

SELECT d.*, p.dept_name AS parent_dept_name FROM departments d LEFT JOIN departments p ON d.parent_dept_code = p.dept_code
AND d.dept_code LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deptCode}, '%')
AND d.dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deptName}, '%')
ORDER BY d.dept_level, d.dept_code
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO departments (dept_code, dept_name, parent_dept_code, dept_level, dept_type, start_date, end_date, address, tel) VALUES (#{deptCode}, #{deptName}, #{parentDeptCode}, #{deptLevel}, #{deptType}, #{startDate}, #{endDate}, #{address}, #{tel})
mapper.update: UPDATE departments SET dept_name = #{deptName}, parent_dept_code = #{parentDeptCode}, dept_level = #{deptLevel}, dept_type = #{deptType}, start_date = #{startDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, address = #{address}, tel = #{tel}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE dept_code = #{deptCode}
